task_completion.description: Verify that the calendar file was imported successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar application displays the imported events, specifically 'Q3 Roadmap Review', 'Acme Corp Pitch', and 'Dentist Appointment'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and color configuration of the 'Internal Sync' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The category management or settings window shows a category named 'Internal Sync' associated with a blue color (#0000FF).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and color configuration of the 'Client Call' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The category management or settings window shows a category named 'Client Call' associated with a green color (#008000).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation and color configuration of the 'Personal Time' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The category management or settings window shows a category named 'Personal Time' associated with an orange color (#FFA500).

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Internal Sync' is applied to 'Q3 Roadmap Review'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event 'Q3 Roadmap Review' in the calendar view is colored blue or explicitly shows the 'Internal Sync' category tag in its properties.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Client Call' is applied to 'Acme Corp Pitch'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event 'Acme Corp Pitch' in the calendar view is colored green or explicitly shows the 'Client Call' category tag in its properties.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Personal Time' is applied to 'Dentist Appointment'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event 'Dentist Appointment' in the calendar view is colored orange or explicitly shows the 'Personal Time' category tag in its properties.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical calendar application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a genuine GUI calendar application (e.g., Thunderbird, Evolution, KOrganizer) being used, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not manually edit the .ics file using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of the agent opening 'busy_schedule.ics' in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually type category names or hex codes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the application's dialogs to apply categories.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with event properties, edit dialogs, or category assignment menus within the calendar app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Categories and Colors: 'Internal Sync' must be Blue (#0000FF), 'Client Call' must be Green (#008000), and 'Personal Time' must be Orange (#FFA500). Expected Event Mappings: 'Q3 Roadmap Review' -> Internal Sync, 'Acme Corp Pitch' -> Client Call, 'Dentist Appointment' -> Personal Time.
